candidates.why: Explicit total current assets line on the balance sheet; directly matches ACT.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets; inferior to the explicit total.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing line for non-current assets; not ACT.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash line; exact match for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Sale of subsidiaries less acquired cash
candidates.why: Cash flow item, not ending cash balance.
Operating cash flow, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash flw before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Intermediate cash flow subtotal, not cash balance.
Investing cash flow subtotal, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash flw from financing activities C
candidates.why: Financing cash flow subtotal, not cash balance.
Explicit total current liabilities line on the balance sheet; directly matches LCT.
Balancing line, not the reported total current liabilities.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.
Balancing line for non-current liabilities; not LCT.

variables.notes: Clear reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Explicit current borrowing line; best match for short-term debt/current portion of debt and excludes leases.
Current lease liability, but leases should be excluded from STD under the baseline rule.
Operating liability, not short-term debt.
Too broad; includes non-debt current liabilities.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist candidates because no STD candidates were provided. This is the clean current borrowing line and excludes lease liabilities.

candidates.why: Deferred tax is not taxes payable/current tax liabilities payable.
Cash flow item, not balance-sheet taxes payable.

variables.notes: No clear current taxes payable/current tax liabilities payable row is present on the balance sheet preview. Deferred tax liabilities are not TXP.

candidates.why: Best reported balance-sheet line for property, plant and equipment; likely net PPE total under IFRS presentation.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Net - Total - Balancing value
candidates.why: Semantically very close to total net PPE, but appears to be a balancing line and preview values are blank; use only as lower-priority fallback.
Gross component only, not total PPE, and incomplete versus a cleaner total line.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Gross
candidates.why: Lease-related ROU assets only, not total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: ROU assets only and balancing-style line, not total PPE.
Not PPE.
Capex flow, not the balance-sheet PPE stock.

final_choice.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Net - Total - Balancing value

variables.notes: Primary choice is the cleaner reported balance-sheet stock line. Added the explicit net PPE total label as fallback for years where it may be populated.

candidates.why: Explicit total assets line; direct match for AT.
Direct operating cash flow subtotal; best match for OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Cash flw before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Intermediate subtotal before working-capital changes, not final operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Chosen outside shortlist candidates because no OANCF candidates were provided. This is the standard net cash from operating activities line.
